You are assisting in a scientific Python project.

Strict rules:
- Do NOT rewrite large blocks of code unless explicitly requested
- Only modify the minimal necessary lines
- Preserve existing architecture and structure
- Follow marimo notebook constraints (no redefinitions across cells)
- Avoid duplicate imports
- Move reusable logic to src/, not notebooks
- Use clear, short functions

Code style:
- No unnecessary comments
- No overengineering
- Prefer explicit over clever

Before writing code:
- Briefly explain what you are going to change

If unclear:
- Ask instead of guessing
